query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
-- DIV102 Lesson 1: Biblical Foundation for Deliverance (360021)
(360021, 'What is the primary Greek word for deliverance used in the New Testament?', 'multiple_choice', '["Sozo","Exousia","Dunamis","Logos"]', 'Sozo', 1),
(360021, 'In Luke 4:18, Jesus declared He came to set at liberty those who are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Wealthy","Oppressed","Educated","Famous"]', 'Oppressed', 2),
(360021, 'The authority to cast out demons was given to the disciples in which Gospel?', 'multiple_choice', '["Matthew only","Mark only","Luke only","All Synoptic Gospels"]', 'All Synoptic Gospels', 3),
(360021, 'What does the term "exorcism" literally mean?', 'multiple_choice', '["To bind","To cast out by oath","To pray over","To anoint"]', 'To cast out by oath', 4),
(360021, 'According to Mark 16:17, casting out demons is a sign that will follow:', 'multiple_choice', '["Apostles only","Prophets only","Those who believe","Church leaders only"]', 'Those who believe', 5),
(360021, 'The Hebrew term "yasha" primarily means:', 'multiple_choice', '["To judge","To save or deliver","To condemn","To punish"]', 'To save or deliver', 6),
(360021, 'In the Old Testament, who delivered Israel from Egyptian bondage?', 'multiple_choice', '["Abraham","Moses through God","Joshua","David"]', 'Moses through God', 7),
(360021, 'What is the significance of Jesus casting out demons by the finger of God?', 'multiple_choice', '["It shows weakness","It demonstrates divine authority","It was symbolic only","It was temporary"]', 'It demonstrates divine authority', 8),
(360021, 'The ministry of deliverance is rooted in which aspect of Christs work?', 'multiple_choice', '["His teaching only","His victory over Satan","His parables","His baptism"]', 'His victory over Satan', 9),
(360021, 'According to Colossians 1:13, believers have been delivered from:', 'multiple_choice', '["Physical illness","The domain of darkness","Financial problems","Social rejection"]', 'The domain of darkness', 10),
(360021, 'Explain the biblical basis for the ministry of deliverance and its relevance for the church today.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'The ministry of deliverance is grounded in Christs victory over Satan and the authority given to believers.', 11),

-- DIV102 Lesson 2: Understanding Spiritual Warfare (360022)
(360022, 'According to Ephesians 6:12, our struggle is NOT against:', 'multiple_choice', '["Flesh and blood","Principalities","Powers","Spiritual wickedness"]', 'Flesh and blood', 1),
(360022, 'The armor of God passage is found in which chapter of Ephesians?', 'multiple_choice', '["Chapter 4","Chapter 5","Chapter 6","Chapter 3"]', 'Chapter 6', 2),
(360022, 'What is the sword of the Spirit according to Ephesians 6:17?', 'multiple_choice', '["Prayer","Fasting","The Word of God","Worship"]', 'The Word of God', 3),
(360022, 'The term principalities (archai) refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human governments","Demonic rulers","Angels only","Church leaders"]', 'Demonic rulers', 4),
(360022, 'In 2 Corinthians 10:4, Paul describes our weapons as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Carnal","Mighty through God","Weak","Physical"]', 'Mighty through God', 5),
(360022, 'The shield of faith is designed to quench:', 'multiple_choice', '["All arrows","Fiery darts of the wicked","Physical attacks","Verbal accusations"]', 'Fiery darts of the wicked', 6),
(360022, 'What does standing firm in spiritual warfare primarily involve?', 'multiple_choice', '["Physical strength","Maintaining faith and truth","Running away","Ignoring the enemy"]', 'Maintaining faith and truth', 7),
(360022, 'The belt of truth represents:', 'multiple_choice', '["Physical protection","Integrity and Gods truth","Fashion","Status"]', 'Integrity and Gods truth', 8),
(360022, 'According to James 4:7, what happens when we resist the devil?', 'multiple_choice', '["He attacks harder","He flees from us","He ignores us","Nothing changes"]', 'He flees from us', 9),
(360022, 'The helmet of salvation protects:', 'multiple_choice', '["Our hands","Our feet","Our mind","Our heart only"]', 'Our mind', 10),
(360022, 'Describe the components of spiritual warfare and how believers should engage in it according to Scripture.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Spiritual warfare involves putting on the full armor of God and using spiritual weapons.', 11),

-- DIV102 Lesson 3: Identifying Demonic Influence (360023)
(360023, 'What is the difference between demonic oppression and possession?', 'multiple_choice', '["No difference","Oppression is external, possession is internal control","Oppression is worse","Possession is external"]', 'Oppression is external, possession is internal control', 1),
(360023, 'In Mark 5, the demoniac of Gadara exhibited which symptom?', 'multiple_choice', '["Peaceful behavior","Supernatural strength","Normal social interaction","Contentment"]', 'Supernatural strength', 2),
(360023, 'Which of these is NOT typically a sign of demonic influence?', 'multiple_choice', '["Violent reactions to the name of Jesus","Normal spiritual growth","Inability to confess Christ as Lord","Occult involvement"]', 'Normal spiritual growth', 3),
(360023, 'The gift of discerning of spirits is mentioned in:', 'multiple_choice', '["Romans 12","1 Corinthians 12","Galatians 5","Ephesians 4"]', '1 Corinthians 12', 4),
(360023, 'Generational curses can be broken through:', 'multiple_choice', '["Ignoring them","Christs redemption and renunciation","Physical rituals","Time alone"]', 'Christs redemption and renunciation', 5),
(360023, 'What was the primary entry point for demonic influence in the Gadarene demoniac?', 'multiple_choice', '["Scripture does not specify","Wealth","Education","Family status"]', 'Scripture does not specify', 6),
(360023, 'Soul ties that need to be broken are typically formed through:', 'multiple_choice', '["Normal friendships","Ungodly relationships and covenants","Church attendance","Bible study"]', 'Ungodly relationships and covenants', 7),
(360023, 'The term demonization is preferred by some scholars because:', 'multiple_choice', '["It sounds better","It covers the full spectrum of demonic influence","It is more modern","It is biblical"]', 'It covers the full spectrum of demonic influence', 8),
(360023, 'According to 1 John 4:1, believers should:', 'multiple_choice', '["Accept all spirits","Test the spirits","Ignore spirits","Fear spirits"]', 'Test the spirits', 9),
(360023, 'Which Old Testament practice opened doors to demonic influence?', 'multiple_choice', '["Prayer","Fasting","Consulting mediums","Tithing"]', 'Consulting mediums', 10),
(360023, 'Explain how to identify demonic influence and the importance of spiritual discernment in deliverance ministry.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'Identifying demonic influence requires spiritual discernment and knowledge of biblical signs.', 11),

-- DIV102 Lesson 4: The Process of Deliverance (360024)
(360024, 'What is typically the first step in the deliverance process?', 'multiple_choice', '["Casting out demons","Confession and repentance","Physical restraint","Ignoring the problem"]', 'Confession and repentance', 1),
(360024, 'Why is renunciation important in deliverance?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is optional","It breaks legal ground the enemy may have","It is just tradition","It impresses others"]', 'It breaks legal ground the enemy may have', 2),
(360024, 'The authority to cast out demons comes from:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal holiness alone","The name of Jesus Christ","Loud voices","Special formulas"]', 'The name of Jesus Christ', 3),
(360024, 'What did Jesus say about the demon that would not come out in Mark 9?', 'multiple_choice', '["It was too strong","This kind comes out only by prayer and fasting","It was impossible","Give up"]', 'This kind comes out only by prayer and fasting', 4),
(360024, 'After deliverance, what is essential for maintaining freedom?', 'multiple_choice', '["Nothing special","Filling with the Holy Spirit and Gods Word","Isolation","Constant deliverance sessions"]', 'Filling with the Holy Spirit and Gods Word', 5),
(360024, 'The strong man parable in Matthew 12 teaches that:', 'multiple_choice', '["Demons are weak","The strong man must be bound first","Physical strength matters","Deliverance is impossible"]', 'The strong man must be bound first', 6),
(360024, 'What role does forgiveness play in deliverance?', 'multiple_choice', '["None","It removes legal ground for demonic oppression","It is optional","It weakens faith"]', 'It removes legal ground for demonic oppression', 7),
(360024, 'Why should deliverance ministry be done in teams when possible?', 'multiple_choice', '["For entertainment","For accountability, support, and safety","It is required","To share blame"]', 'For accountability, support, and safety', 8),
(360024, 'What warning did Jesus give about a delivered person in Matthew 12:43-45?', 'multiple_choice', '["They are permanently free","The demon may return with seven others if the house is empty","Deliverance never works","Demons cannot return"]', 'The demon may return with seven others if the house is empty', 9),
(360024, 'The ministry of deliverance should always be accompanied by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Publicity","Discipleship and follow-up","Isolation","Secrecy"]', 'Discipleship and follow-up', 10),
(360024, 'Outline the biblical process of deliverance and explain why each step is important.', 'short_answer', '[]', 'The deliverance process includes confession, renunciation, commanding spirits to leave, and follow-up discipleship.', 11);
command:
